endpoints.name: Legacy Box Scores Active
endpoints.description: This method returns box scores for all games that are either in-progress or have been updated within the last 30 minutes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Teams (All)
endpoints.description: Gets all teams, including pro bowl teams.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Are Games In Progress
endpoints.description: Returns true if there is at least one game being played at the time of the request or false if there are none.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Legacy Box Score
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{WEEK}} with a real week. Replace {{HOMETEAM}} with a real hometeam. Replace {{SEASON}} with a real season.

endpoints.name: Box Score by ScoreID V3
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{SCOREID}} with a real scoreid.

endpoints.name: Box Score V3
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{WEEK}} with a real week. Replace {{HOMETEAM}} with a real hometeam. Replace {{SEASON}} with a real season.

endpoints.name: Legacy Box Scores
endpoints.description: This method returns all box scores for a given season and week.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{WEEK}} with a real week. Replace {{SEASON}} with a real season.

endpoints.name: Legacy Box Scores Delta
endpoints.description: This method returns all box scores for a given season and week, but only returns player stats that have changed in the last X minutes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{MINUTES}} with a real minutes. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{WEEK}} with a real week. Replace {{SEASON}} with a real season.

endpoints.name: Box Scores Delta V3
endpoints.description: This method returns all box scores for a given season and week, but only returns player stats that have changed in the last X minutes. You can also filter by type of player stats to include, such as traditional fantasy players, IDP players or all players.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{PLAYERSTOINCLUDE}} with a real playerstoinclude. Replace {{MINUTES}} with a real minutes. Replace {{WEEK}} with a real week. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{SEASON}} with a real season.

endpoints.name: Bye Weeks
endpoints.description: Get bye weeks for the teams during a specified NFL season.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{SEASON}} with a real season.

endpoints.name: Season Current
endpoints.description: Year of the current NFL season. This value changes at the start of the new NFL league year. The earliest season for Fantasy data is 2001. The earliest season for Team data is 1985. The earliest season for Fantasy data is 2001. The earliest season for Team data is 1985.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Week Current
endpoints.description: Number of the current week of the NFL season. This value usually changes on Tuesday nights or Wednesday mornings at midnight ET.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.

endpoints.name: Season Upcoming
endpoints.description: Year of the current NFL season, if we are in the mid-season. If we are in the off-season, then year of the next upcoming season. This value changes immediately after the Super Bowl. The earliest season for Fantasy data is 2001. The earliest season for Team data is 1985.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format.
